raw_consumer_statement: I am the owner of XXXX Citi credit card and I have my credit card even on my phone ( XXXX XXXX ). I live in XXXX Florida. My name is XXXX XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX I got XXXX texts advising me about XXXX purchases in XXXX different XXXX grocery stores around XXXX OH of {$50.00}. Immediately I called the bank to report the fraud and they changed the card in real time they inserted the new card into XXXX XXXX into my phone. The day after I noticed XXXX more unauthorized purchases of {$10.00} and {$12.00} in XXXXXXXX XXXX DC. I disputed even those XXXX transactions with my bank and they changed again my credit card with the same procedure end adding the new XXXX to my phone XXXX XXXX. The situation continued until today when I had XXXX more unauthorized transaction on the same XXXXXXXX XXXX DC of {$10.00} on the card that was on my XXXX XXXX but I didn't have it yet physically. To make the long story short today XX/XX/XXXX I have the XXXX credit card changed in 13 days. Can you do something? Thank you. XXXX XXXX
